get_merge_request.title: Prorate subscription upgrades mid-cycle
get_merge_request.description:
## What & why

When a customer upgrades mid-cycle we now charge a prorated amount for the remainder of
the billing period instead of the full new-plan price. Resolves the over-charging
complaints on upgrades.

Jira: https://acme.atlassian.net/browse/BILL-377

## How to test

1. `npm install && npm run dev`
2. Create a subscription on the basic plan, then upgrade to pro halfway through the cycle.
3. Confirm the invoice shows a prorated charge, not the full pro price.
4. Run `npm test -- proration` to exercise the unit tests.

## Notes for reviewer

Start in `src/billing/proration.ts` (the proration math); the invoice wiring in
`invoice.service.ts` is thin. No breaking changes, no migrations.
get_merge_request.commit_summary: 3 commits: add proration math, wire invoice, add tests
